title: CHILD ADVOCACY CENTER - 211info
text: KIDS FIRST CHILD ADVOCACY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assessments, support services, medical evaluations, and forensic evaluations. Also provides therapy and counseling referrals, safety planning, advocacy services, and community training. 299 E 18th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Children ages 0-18 suspected to be victims of all types of abuse and domestic violence or neglect Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 682-3938 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 682-3938 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of legal custody AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Child Abuse Counseling Child Abuse Prevention Child Advocacy Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. KIDS FIRST
